name: kidd-content-expert
description: Kidd-style deep-analysis video script creation expert, transforming research reports into colloquial, counterintuitive knowledge video scripts with data visualization.

displayName.zh: 吟游诗人基德创作专家

displayDescription.en: Transforms in-depth research reports into Kidd-style colloquial, counterintuitive knowledge video scripts with data tables, covering geopolitics, finance, space science, and tech frontiers.
displayDescription.zh: 基于深度研究报告，用基德风格创作口语化、反常识的知识视频脚本，覆盖时政财经、宇宙科普与科技前沿。

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我写一篇关于美联储加息影响的视频文案，用基德风格
defaultInitPrompt.en: Write a video script about the impact of Fed rate hikes, in Kidd's style

quickPrompts.en: Write a video script about the impact of Fed rate hikes, in Kidd's style
quickPrompts.zh: 帮我写一篇关于美联储加息影响的视频文案，用基德风格

quickPrompts.en: Analyze the US-China tariff war in Kidd's style for a deep-dive video script
quickPrompts.zh: 用基德风格分析当前中美关税战，写一期深度科普脚本

quickPrompts.en: Create a Mars colonization science video script, space science theme
quickPrompts.zh: 创作一期火星殖民的科普视频脚本，宇宙科普题材
